summary.headline: Most core Portfolio subscriptions remain active or unresolved. BuiltWith is a watch item during outreach ramp; Fireflies is resolved as canceled.
nextReviewFocus: Check Vapi dashboard call history and production voice enablement.
Verify whether Resend is configured in production.
Check Pinecone billing/API usage against the RAG replacement path.

vendors.name: BuiltWith
vendors.usageSignal: No confirmed operational usage in the latest pass, but client traffic is still early.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Tech-stack lookup/enrichment supports lead prep, implementation strategy, and feasibility assessment.
vendors.recommendation: Keep active during outreach ramp; reassess after more leads, audits, implementation strategies, proposals, and client outcomes.
vendors.nextAction: Compare sales-flow outcomes where BuiltWith enrichment helped versus leads where it did not.

vendors.name: Fireflies.ai
vendors.billingSignal: Refund found on 2026-03-20; Vambah confirmed canceled on 2026-05-01.
vendors.usageSignal: Prior Slack recap evidence overlapped with Read.ai; no longer an active paid-plan target.
vendors.portfolioDependency: No direct Portfolio repo integration found in the latest audit.
vendors.recommendation: Keep out of active cancellation queue unless new paid-plan evidence appears.
vendors.nextAction: No action unless a new Fireflies receipt or paid-plan signal appears.

vendors.name: Vercel
vendors.billingSignal: No billing receipt found in the latest Gmail pass; connector did not expose a team/project.
vendors.usageSignal: Production hosting is likely but unverified from the current connector context.
vendors.recommendation: Keep until dashboard/account ownership and project billing are confirmed.
vendors.nextAction: Use dashboard access to locate the actual hosting account/project and billing owner.

vendors.name: Printful
vendors.billingSignal: No recent billing receipt found in the latest Gmail pass.
vendors.usageSignal: Fulfillment code exists and product variants are present; printful_sync_log was quiet.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Store fulfillment and merchandise sync risk.
vendors.nextAction: Check Printful dashboard/store order history and whether merchandise remains part of the active offer set.

vendors.name: Vapi
vendors.billingSignal: No recent billing receipt found in the latest Gmail pass.
vendors.usageSignal: Voice code and env references exist; no fresh call usage signal was confirmed.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Voice/audit experience risk if production voice UI is enabled.
vendors.recommendation: Investigate dashboard call history before classifying.
vendors.nextAction: Check Vapi dashboard call history and whether production voice UX is enabled.

vendors.name: Resend
vendors.billingSignal: No recent billing receipt found in the latest Gmail pass.
vendors.usageSignal: Optional transactional email provider with Gmail fallback.
vendors.portfolioDependency: Transactional email delivery risk if production is configured to use Resend.
vendors.recommendation: Verify production env before keeping as a paid dependency or removing.
vendors.nextAction: Confirm whether production uses Resend or Gmail/n8n as the real outbound channel.

vendors.name: Pinecone
vendors.billingSignal: No recent billing receipt found in the latest Gmail pass.
vendors.usageSignal: n8n RAG workflow references remain active.
vendors.recommendation: Check billing/API usage and compare with Supabase/local RAG replacement path.
vendors.nextAction: Verify Pinecone usage and whether the current RAG path still depends on it.
